name: baibebalo-monorepo
description: Racine du projet Baibebalo – scripts de test globaux

scripts.test:all: npm run test:all --prefix baibebalo-backend && npm run test:all --prefix baibebalo-admin && npm run test:all --prefix baibebalo-client-clean && npm run test:all --prefix baibebalo-livreur && npm run test:all --prefix baibebalo-restaurant
